plugin_web_desc: Network access for Google searches and quick opening of websites.
plugin_web_search_desc: Executes a Google search for the specified term.
plugin_web_open_desc: Opens a web address in the default browser.
plugin_web_use_https_desc: Forces HTTPS for site openings without a protocol
plugin_web_open_new_tab_desc: Opens links in a new tab instead of a new window
plugin_web_modello_llm_desc: Specific AI model for Web Search (empty = global default)
plugin_web_open_success: Web Protocol: Site '{url}' opened in the browser.
plugin_web_search_success: Search started: I've searched for '{query}' for you, Admin.
